description: Style Note No chance of making a fashion faux pas when you're carrying the wallet from Reid and Taylor clean, classic styling made of genuine, understated leather, this piece would also make a great gift. Featuring multiple card slots, this sleek wallet offers unbeatable practical style. Product Details Black two-fold leather wallet Has two main compartments Four card holder slots and a slip pocket on both folds A removable flap with id slots on the inner and card holder slots on the outer Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cm
